statusLegend.completed: Implemented and verified locally or by benchmark.
statusLegend.pending: Not started or needs another benchmark/fix loop.

tasks.title: Add repeatable no-DB owner-contact benchmark harness
tasks.notes: scripts/owner_contact_benchmark.py runs CSV subsets in memory, writes benchmark JSON, and avoids Postgres/Notion writes.

tasks.title: Migrate paid enrichment calls to Orthogonal Run API with x402 fallback
tasks.notes: pipeline/orthogonal.py centralizes Run API calls. Query params are stringified for Orthogonal. 4xx/timeouts are no longer masked by empty x402 fallback.

tasks.title: Improve owner-name coverage with website/domain recovery and leadership-page scrape
tasks.notes: Domain recovery, linked leadership-page discovery, public-agency senior decision-maker handling, and person-match guards are in place.

tasks.title: Add Sixtyfour owner-phone path
tasks.notes: Sixtyfour /find-phone runs after owner identity is known; /enrich-company can find senior decision makers when no person exists, but it is slower and should remain benchmarked carefully.

tasks.title: Add per-lead benchmark diagnostics
tasks.notes: Benchmark JSON now includes lead_diagnostics with missing_truthful, why_missing, and step_outcomes.

tasks.title: Fix CSV address parsing for wholesale CSV shape
tasks.notes: Addresses shaped as street, city, state, country, zip now preserve zipcode. Verified by tests/test_csv_import_guards.py.

tasks.title: Clean and organize planning docs
tasks.notes: Archived completed/superseded docs and stale benchmark JSONs under docs/archive/2026-05-08-doc-cleanup. Current owner-contact plan and benchmark summary are the active source of truth.

tasks.title: Improve domain recovery for any row with no verified website
tasks.notes: Implemented generic domain recovery improvements: full location/ZIP query context, cleaned LinkedIn company slug terms, bare-domain normalization, conservative verified domain guesses, and rejected-candidate diagnostics. Verified with tests/test_domain_recovery.py (14 passed). 5-row wholesale benchmark recovered a website/domain for the prior no-domain row and improved owner_name to 5/5.

tasks.title: Improve owner-email follow-up for any verified person + domain with no truthful owner email
tasks.notes: Implemented a generic owner-email follow-up stage for grounded owner/senior decision-maker + verified domain rows where owner_email is empty or company_fallback only. It tries Hunter email-finder first, then Sixtyfour /find-email, preserves company_fallback as non-truthful, and emits skip/no-result diagnostics. Verified with focused suite (45 passed).

tasks.title: Improve phone fallback for any grounded owner row where current providers return no phone
tasks.notes: General case: owner/senior decision-maker name and domain/email exist, but owner_phone is empty after Apollo, Hunter, and Sixtyfour. Regression example only: KWI. Do not use company_phone as owner_phone; any new strategy must be source-attributed and benchmarked.

tasks.title: Make Notion export call-ready for any enriched lead
tasks.notes: Add/verify owner title, owner-field sources, confidence/missing reason, and company-vs-owner contact distinction in Notion payload. This should apply generically to search and CSV leads.

tasks.title: Scale benchmarks beyond tiny slices
tasks.notes: 5-row wholesale memory benchmark improved to owner_name 5/5, owner_email 4/5, owner_phone 4/5. Ask explicit approval before running the 10-row wholesale benchmark because it sends new CSV rows to external enrichment providers.
